response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong profile with 13+ years of fullstack development experience, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL (via MongoDB experience). His background in energy/geospatial platforms (GISCollective) aligns well with renewable energy workflows, and his AWS/CDK exposure is valuable. While his recent roles are senior-heavy, his adaptability and pragmatic problem-solving suggest quick onboarding potential.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Proven scalability expertise (handling high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby)
Relevant domain experience in geospatial/energy platforms (GISCollective)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (13+ years of senior experience)
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (only MongoDB listed in skills)
High on-site requirement may conflict with current roles in India
